nasb.text: He shall also take away its crop with its feathers and cast it beside the altar eastward, to the place of the ashes.

esv.text: He shall remove its crop with its contents and cast it beside the altar on the east side, in the place for ashes.

cnv.text: 又要除掉鳥的嗉囊和髒物，丟在祭壇東邊，倒灰的地方。

ccb.text: 要除掉鸟的嗉子和羽毛，丢在祭坛东边倒灰的地方。
